The '''Mark IV assault droid''' was a model of quadrupedal [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] used by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] alike.

==History==
[[File:Sithassaultdroid.jpg|left|thumb|A Mark IV assault droid typically seen during the Jedi Civil War.]]
The Mark IV assault droid was originally created by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in the days prior to the [[Mandalorian Wars]], but later became one of the most common droids in the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]]. While the Republic used them as automated defenses, patrolling cities or military installations, the Sith Empire used these droids to fill out their military ranks and also as defense forces on starships throughout the fleet and military bases, like those on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] and [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]]. These droids were used primarily in a defensive manner, and despite their simple programming, proved exceptionally capable of repelling [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] boarding parties attempting to seize Sith starships. During actual assaults, the Sith preferred to rely upon more mobile forces, such as [[Sith trooper (Sith Empire)|Sith troopers]].

Some of these droids were provided with a bubble-like energy [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] which rendered them especially effective against ranged weapons and [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. They were also used by the [[Ahto City Civil Authority]].
